combatNotes: Shield: +2 AC, impose disadvantage on attacker (reaction). Divine Smite: expend a spell slot on hit — 2d8 radiant per slot level (max 5d8), +1d8 vs undead/fiends.

feats.d: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You can't discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.
You have advantage on all Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.
Through sounds and gestures, you can communicate simple ideas with Small or smaller beasts.
You know the Minor Illusion cantrip. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for it.

As an action, you can open your awareness to detect such forces. Until the end of your next turn, you know the location of any celestial, fiend, or undead within 60 feet that is not behind total cover. You sense the type of creature but not its identity. Uses: CHA mod + 1 (3) per long rest.

Your blessed touch can heal wounds. You have a pool of healing power that replenishes on a long rest. With that pool, you can restore a total of 15 hit points (5 × level). You can also expend 5 points to cure a disease or neutralize a poison.
When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, you can expend one spell slot to deal radiant damage: 2d8 per slot level (max 5d8 at slot 4+). +1d8 extra against undead or fiends.
The divine magic flowing through you makes you immune to disease.

As an action, you can cause spectral vines to spring up and reach for a creature within 10 feet. The creature must succeed on a Strength or Dexterity saving throw (its choice) or be restrained. While restrained, the creature repeats the save at the end of each turn. On a success, it frees itself. 1 use per short or long rest.

As an action, you present your holy symbol and speak a prayer censuring fiends and fey. Each fiend or fey within 30 feet must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is turned for 1 minute or until it takes damage. Shares Channel Divinity use with Nature's Wrath.
Not yet available. Noted for future reference.

atks.no: +4 to hit. Silver. Add Divine Smite on hit by expending a slot.
+4 to hit. Also usable as melee.

1.desc: Ensnaring Strike (Oath) — Conc. 1 min. On hit, vines restrain the target. STR save or restrained. Repeats save each turn.

2.desc: Speak with Animals (Oath) — Ritual. 10 min. Comprehend and communicate with beasts.

3.desc: Moonbeam (Oath) — Conc. 1 min. 5ft cylinder of pale light. 2d10 radiant on entry or start of turn. CON save for half. Shapeshifters have disadvantage.

4.desc: Misty Step (Oath) — Bonus action. Teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.
4.classes: Sorcerer, Wizard / Oath of the Ancients

inv.no: Heavy armor. AC 16. Disadvantage on Stealth.
+2 AC. Can impose disadvantage on attacker (reaction).
Trophy from a past battle. Origin unspecified.

rels.r: Son of the Burgomaster — Village of Barovia
rels.no: Asked us to escort Ireena to Vallaki. Trustworthy.
Capable and direct. Goal is to get her to Vallaki safely.
Broken by what happened to his son. Gave us info on vampire weaknesses.

rels.r: Donavich's son — vampire spawn in chains
rels.no: Chained in the church basement. If Strahd dies, Doru is freed. Sarda wanted to go down.
Child ghost. We promised to deal with the monster in the basement.
Briefly possessed Sarda's body out of panic.
Rescued him in the ruins. Plays the flute. Light-fingered.

personality.traits: I love being strong and breaking things. I spread light and hope wherever I go.
personality.ideals: I do what I must and obey the law — until it stops making sense.
personality.bonds: I would give my life for those I have sworn to protect.
personality.flaws: Little respect for those who are not warriors.
